title: Add mixup training to affine warmup-cosine CNN
methodology: Added batchwise mixup augmentation during training on top of the current affine-augmented CNN, mixing both images and labels while keeping label smoothing and the warmup-cosine Adam schedule unchanged.
motivation: Research brief on 2026-03-28 suggested trying untested data augmentation and combining successful elements from exp-031 without repeating discarded regularization changes.
